name: Lobster Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the court boullion by combining all ingredients in a stock pot and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 40 minutes.
3. Return to a fast boil and add the live lobsters. Boil for 8 minutes.
4. Remove lobsters and cool. Remove meat from shell and dice into medium size pieces.
5. Mix the juices, zest, tarragon, and creme fraiche in a medium bowl. Season with salt and black pepper. Set aside for at least one hour to allow flavors to develop.
6. Assembly and garnish:
- Slice 1/4 of the cucumber thinly. Julienne the remainder.
- Mix 3/4 cup of the creme fraiche with the lobster meat in a separate bowl.
- In another separate bowl, mix the remainder of the creme fraiche with the julienne cucumber and endive.
- Line the inside of four martini glasses with overlapping cucumber slices.
- Place 1/4 of the cucumber-endive salad in the bottom of the glasses, followed by the lobster salad.
- Top with a few leaves of mesclun. Garnish each glass with 2 endive spears and 3 chives.
